auto_check.label: Auto check
auto_check.description: Automatically check for updates on startup.

check_interval.label: Check interval (minutes)
check_interval.description: How often to check for updates automatically, in minutes. Default 360 (6 hours).

flatpak_enabled.label: Enable Flatpak updates
flatpak_enabled.description: Check for Flatpak package updates. Requires flatpak.
